item.title: Mandelson documents cast light on government work, appointment of US ambassador - Reuters
item.description: Mandelson documents cast light on government work, appointment of US ambassador  Reuters'Beleaguered and bereft' - Mandelson messages reveal criticism of No 10  BBCUK Releases More Files About Mandelson, Ex-Diplomat With Ties to Epstein  The New York TimesMore Mandelson files released in UK bring bad news for Starmer, but many questions remain unanswered  AP NewsMandelson files reveal a man for whom betrayal is a way of life | John Crace  The Guardian

item.title: Israel PM orders strikes on Beirut suburbs as Hezbollah conflict escalates - BBC
item.description: Israel PM orders strikes on Beirut suburbs as Hezbollah conflict escalates  BBCU.S. push for Lebanon ceasefire stalls as Israel eyes Beirut strikes  AxiosIDF confirms post-ceasefire announcement rocket and drone attacks by Hezbollah  The Times of IsraelNetanyahu Orders Israeli Military to Attack Beirut Suburbs  The New York TimesA Lebanese hospital is in ruins and people flee a Beirut suburb after Israel’s threat, in photos  AP News

item.title: Right-wing candidate pulls ahead in first round of Colombia's presidential vote - NPR
item.description: Right-wing candidate pulls ahead in first round of Colombia's presidential vote  NPRColombian presidency goes to runoff election that could redefine relations with the US  CNNOpinion | The High Stakes in Colombia’s Presidential Runoff  WSJColombia’s populist, Bukele-loving right looks likely to win power  The EconomistPro-Trump candidate pulls ahead in Colombia presidential vote as ruling party sows doubt in results  AP News

item.title: Poland revives its ‘Highway to Hel’ 666 bus route - CNN
item.description: Poland revives its ‘Highway to Hel’ 666 bus route  CNN666 bus to Hel back in business, as firm resurrects doomed Polish tourist route  CBS News‘Hellish’ bus 666 returns as FlixBus launches route to Hel  Euronews.comPoland's controversial 'Highway to Hel' 666 bus revived  BBCPoland’s 666 bus to Hel returns in new form  Notes From Poland

item.title: Rescuers search for alternative route to reach 2 missing in a flooded Laos cave - AP News
item.description: Rescuers search for alternative route to reach 2 missing in a flooded Laos cave  AP NewsRace against time for Laos cave rescuers as focus shifts to newly discovered shaft  CNNRescuers race to save last two men trapped in Laos cave  NBC NewsLaos cave survivors help with plan to find last two missing men  BBCRescuers Scramble to Reach Pair Trapped Deep Inside Flooded Cave in Laos  The Daily Beast

item.title: Romanian Leader Dan Calls on Kremlin to Hit Targets in Ukraine More Accurately - Kyiv Post
item.description: Romanian Leader Dan Calls on Kremlin to Hit Targets in Ukraine More Accurately  Kyiv PostRussian Offensive Campaign Assessment, May 29, 2026  Institute for the Study of WarRussian official warns Europe to brace for more drone incidents after Romania episode  ReutersThe Russian Drone That Hit Romania Also Hit European Confidence  The New York TimesFormer NATO official says ‘better’ drone defences urgently needed  Euronews.com

item.title: Ethiopia’s election: Parties, coalitions and candidates explained - Al Jazeera
item.description: Ethiopia’s election: Parties, coalitions and candidates explained  Al JazeeraEthiopia’s PM won a Nobel Peace Prize, stoked a civil war - and is set for re-election  CNNWhat to Know About Ethiopia’s Election  The New York TimesEthiopia election: Voting suspended in parts of the country as Prime Minister Abiy Ahmed seeks another term  BBCEthiopian election expected to give leader Abiy's party a landslide win  Reuters

item.title: Russia Finance Officials Tell Putin War Spending Is Unaffordable - Bloomberg.com
item.description: Russia Finance Officials Tell Putin War Spending Is Unaffordable  Bloomberg.comShort on growth ideas, Putin hosts fifth wartime 'Russian Davos'  ReutersRussia begins talks of ending the war to save the economy – Reuters  Українські Національні Новини (УНН)Russia warns war costs are ravaging its finances as Ukrainian 'drone overmatch' halts Putin's forces  FortuneRussia’s War Machine Is Creaking  Jacobin

item.title: France intercepts Russian-linked oil tanker in Atlantic - DW.com
item.description: France intercepts Russian-linked oil tanker in Atlantic  DW.comFrance seizes another sanctioned tanker carrying Russian oil  CNNFrench navy seizes Russia-linked oil tanker in Atlantic  The GuardianFrance seized sanctioned Russian oil tanker with UK help, Macron says  BBCFrench navy, backed by the UK, intercepts Russian oil tanker  Al Jazeera
